commands.summary: P7C runtime files exist under session, state, command, p4_bridge, and coordination semantic families.

commands.command: P7C semantic directory scan for common/misc/utils/helpers/manager/all_in_one and premature P7D/P7E/P7F families

files_by_responsibility.backend/src/video/playback_graph/session: Public PlaybackSession PIMPL allocation, move, destruction, and delegation only
Private session runtime composition and command dispatch only
files_by_responsibility.backend/src/video/playback_graph/command: Command records, rollback, retention, sidecar lifecycle, tombstone queries only
Command conflict decision source of truth only
files_by_responsibility.backend/src/video/playback_graph/p4_brid: P4 command id and playback revision boundary only
files_by_responsibility.backend/src/video/playback_graph/coordin: P7C recovery replay skeleton order and rollback paths only

design_corrections: Added session/playback_session_facade.cpp because public facade definitions and private runtime composition are separate responsibilities.
Placed P7C recovery replay skeleton under coordination instead of recovery to avoid starting the later P7E recovery family before its gate.
allowed_operations_checked: Added one-responsibility runtime files corresponding to approved P7C families
Converted kivo_video_playback_graph from P7B INTERFACE skeleton to P7C STATIC runtime target
forbidden_operations_checked: No attachment/generation/events/realtime/resources/snapshot/observer/evidence/metrics/health runtime families created before later gates
No real decoder, renderer, audio output, provider, or subtitle implementation linked
